heroBody: Your workspace is synced and ready. Jump back into documents, keep your learning momentum moving, and turn raw files into something useful faster.
xpBody: Earn XP by completing lesson steps (quizzes and exams give more). Every 100 XP raises your account level. Keep a daily streak by completing a step on consecutive days.
xpStartLevel: You are at the start of level {level}. Earn 100 XP to reach level {next}.
achievementsBody: Cosmetic milestones — they show your consistency. XP from lessons still drives your level above.
learningEmpty: Start a learning path from any document to see XP and achievements here.
dashboardUploadDesc: Pick a file, then upload. Same panel as on the Documents page.
